detail.description: Denzer Guzman singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Matt Vierling.
Denzer Guzman singles on a line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Zach Neto to 3rd.

Denzer Guzman singles on a ground ball to left fielder Colby Thomas, deflected by third baseman Max Muncy. Josh Lowe scores.
Denzer Guzman doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Henry Bolte.

Denzer Guzman doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Ryan Vilade.

Denzer Guzman singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jordan Lawlar.
Denzer Guzman singles on a ground ball to third baseman Nolan Arenado.
Denzer Guzman singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Tommy Troy.
Denzer Guzman homers (3) on a fly ball to center field. Vaughn Grissom scores. Nolan Schanuel scores.
